name: maintainerops-ai
description: AI-assisted OSS maintainer workflows for PR review, issue triage, security triage, and release notes.

scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:action && npm run build:web
scripts.build:action: node scripts/clean-action-dist.mjs && ncc build src/action.ts --out dist-action --target es2022 && node scripts/write-action-package-json.mjs
scripts.demo: npm run build:cli && node dist/cli.js analyze --fixture examples/fixtures/pull_request.json --format markdown
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run && publint
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:src && npm run test:ui && npm run eval && npm run pack:check && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
